caption: The video displays a presentation slide titled "OPS-5G TA1 – Standards Meet Software". The objective of the presentation is to "Decrease the time required for updates to OPS-5G open source software in response to new versions of the 5G standards." The slide features several logos, including "SRI", "CACTI", and "THE LINUX FOUNDATION", along with the hashtags "#opennetedge" and "@opennetedge". A diagram illustrates a process flowing from "3GPP TS 28.313" through "Machine Translation / Natural Language processing" and "Intermediate Representation" to "Automatic Code Generation". To the right of the diagram, a block of code is visible. In the upper right corner, a small image shows a man wearing a dark suit and a blue shirt. The visual content remains static across all frames, with no movement or changes in the people, objects, or text shown.
